# `api.jobs.save`

> `PUT /job/save` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.jobs.save(*, data: JobSaveRequest | dict) -> None
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab jobs save [--data ...]
```

PUT /job/save.

Args:
    data: Job save payload with jobDisplayId, customer, pickup,
        delivery, and items. Accepts a :class:`JobSaveRequest`
        instance or a dict.

Request model: :class:`JobSaveRequest`

## Request body — `JobSaveRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `jobDisplayId` | `Optional[int]` | no | Job display ID |
| `customer` | `Optional[dict]` | no | Customer details object |
| `pickup` | `Optional[dict]` | no | Pickup location and schedule |
| `delivery` | `Optional[dict]` | no | Delivery location and schedule |
| `items` | `Optional[list[dict]]` | no | Job line items |

## Response

No response body.
